productDisplayName: Puma Men Red Cat Logo Shorts
description: Style NoteDesigned for the sporty soul, this pair of shorts from puma is crafted from soft and absorbent polyester fabric that offers exemplary comfort. The comfortable elasticated waistband sits snug, while you can further customise the Fit with the drawstring. Slip into these shorts when blazing the trail on a healthy run, or on casual day at home, and revel in heavenly comfort. Product DetailsRed shorts with a mesh like inner, an elasticated waistband and drawstrings on the inside, side pockets, brand tab appliqued below the right pocket and printed branding on the left thigh Material and CareShell: 100% polyesterLining: 100% polyesterGentle machine wash in lukewarm water with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32”) is wearing a size M
